name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance at 6302 Waverly Way, Fort Worth, TX 76116 is Mon-Fri 8:30 AM – 8:30 PM. Call +1 682-463-1469.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is a brick-and-mortar short-term lender operating at 1919 Metropolitan Pkwy SW in Atlanta, Georgia. The company appears to be part of a multi-location chain with branches in other states including Colorado, as several customer reviews explicitly reference an Arvada location rather than Atlanta. The storefront keeps extended hours — weekdays 8:30am to 8:30pm and weekends 9:30am to 6:30pm — making it more accessible than standard bank branches.

The lender's core products are cash advance loans and payday loans, both capped at $1,000, designed for borrowers who need funds quickly. They also advertise same-day loans with minimal documentation, and bad credit loans marketed at a wider range of $250 to $50,000. An online application is available touting up to $5,000. All products are described as unsecured. No collateral is required for the standard cash advance or payday products, though a reviewer did mention obtaining a second-lien title loan, suggesting secured products may also be available on request.

The company distinguishes itself primarily on speed and accessibility. The application process is described across reviews as fast, low-friction, and non-intimidating. Staff are praised for not asking excessive questions and for same-day funding. Flexible repayment arrangements are specifically called out by multiple reviewers, suggesting some installment-style structuring is available rather than purely single-balloon payday terms.

Superb Cash Advance fills a clear niche for borrowers who cannot access mainstream credit — but it comes with caveats. No APR or fee disclosures appear on the location page, which is a significant transparency gap. The $250–$50,000 range advertised for bad credit loans is unusually wide and likely reflects a referral or lead-gen arrangement rather than direct lending at the higher end. Prospective borrowers should treat cash advance products as short-term emergency tools, not recurring financial solutions, and confirm current rates before signing.
pros: All credit types accepted — no hard credit check mentioned by multiple reviewers
Same-day approval and funding available for qualifying applicants
Flexible repayment schedules available, not strictly single-payment payday terms
Unsecured loans — no collateral required for core cash advance products
Physical storefront with in-person staff assistance in Atlanta, GA
Online application available for up to $5,000
cons: No APR, fee, or rate information disclosed on the location page — major transparency gap
Customer reviews reference Arvada, CO (not Atlanta), raising questions about review authenticity for this specific location
Cash advance and payday products capped at $1,000 — not suitable for larger financial needs
Bad credit loans advertised up to $50,000 may be referral/lead-gen rather than direct lending
Short-term payday and cash advance products typically carry triple-digit effective APRs not disclosed here
best_for: Atlanta residents needing under $1,000 immediately with no credit check
Borrowers with bad or no credit who have been declined elsewhere
People who prefer in-person assistance over online-only lenders
Consumers needing same-day cash for a one-time emergency expense
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best suited for Atlanta residents who need a small amount of cash (under $1,000) quickly and cannot qualify for bank credit — particularly those who prefer face-to-face service. The main caveat is a complete lack of rate transparency on the site; borrowers must ask about APR in-store before committing, as payday and cash advance products routinely carry very high annualized costs.
services: Installment loans with flexible payment schedules
Second-lien title loans (referenced in customer review)
In-person loan processing at Atlanta storefront
